preflop.rationale: Suited connector JhTh. Call to see flop cheaply. Bot checks behind with AK.

flop.rationale: Open-ended straight flush draw (Qh9h flop gives JhTh straight draw + flush draw). Raise for value. Bot has ace-high nothing.

turn.rationale: Still on strong draw. Bot checks behind. Semi-bluff raise.

river.rationale: Flush completed with 8h. Bot may bet small. Call to extract value.

outcome_by_sequence.preflop:call,flop:raise,turn:raise: Bot folds on turn. Player wins pot with strong draw.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:raise,flop:raise,turn:raise: Bot folds on turn. Player wins bigger pot with aggressive line.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:fold: Player folds preflop, loses small blind.
